    count() - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncQueryBuilder
    Returns the total number of matching items asynchronously by iterating all query result pages.
    count() - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncScanBuilder
    Returns the total number of items asynchronously by iterating all scan result pages.
    count() - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.QueryBuilder
    Returns the total number of matching items by iterating all query result pages.
    count() - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.ScanBuilder
    Returns the total number of items by iterating all scan result pages.
    count() - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.entity.EntityQueryBuilder
    Returns the total number of matching items by iterating all query result pages using Select.COUNT server-side to avoid transferring item data.

    sizeEq(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression.Builder
    Adds a condition on the server-side size of the attribute value: size(attr) = value.
    sizeEq(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.FilterExpression

    sizeGe(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression.Builder
    Adds a condition: size(attr) >= value.

    Adds a condition that the server-side size() of the attribute is greater than or equal to the given value.
    sizeGt(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression.Builder
    Adds a condition: size(attr) > value.
    sizeGt(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.FilterExpression
    Adds a condition that the server-side size() of the attribute is greater than the given value.
    sizeLe(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression.Builder
    Adds a condition: size(attr) <= value.
    sizeLe(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.FilterExpression
    Adds a condition that the server-side size() of the attribute is less than or equal to the given value.
    sizeLt(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.ConditionExpression.Builder
    Adds a condition: size(attr) < value.
    sizeLt(String, int) - Method in class dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.expression.FilterExpression
    Adds a condition that the server-side size() of the attribute is less than the given value.
